description_long: This is a dark wooden desk or cabinet with a classic design, featuring a rectangular top and a symmetrical arrangement of six drawers—three on each side. The front face has a central recessed section with an arched cutout, likely for legroom or decorative purposes, and a single central drawer above it. The drawers are adorned with small metallic handles, and the base has decorative cutouts on the feet, giving it a traditional, elegant appearance. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain visible throughout, and the overall construction appears solid and robust. The finish is smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a polished veneer or lacquered wood.
description: A dark wooden desk or cabinet with six side drawers, a central drawer, and decorative cutouts on the base, finished with metallic handles and a polished surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing six drawers, a central drawer, metallic handles, and decorative cutouts on the base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wooden panel and the thickness of the top and sides.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wooden back panel with visible wood grain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wooden side panel.
